title: Fennec: Jukefox
description: Music assets for the Fennec modpack
body:
Jukefox is a library mod for the **Fennec** NeoForge modpack. It doesn't do much on its own, but right now includes two music discs, several items and fluids, and some simple code. It is intended to be bundled with the _(currently in-development)_ Fennec modpack for the full experience.

**Credits**
Jukefox includes music featured in [Ender Dragon Fight Remastered](https://modrinth.com/datapack/edf-remastered). This means it includes [Solunary - The End at Hand](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GAW5tuC83mE) and [DM DOKURO - Universal Collapse](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3UtURionlvU). These songs are released only under the license terms of their respective authors: Solunary releases The End at Hand specifically for use in Minecraft mods with credit, while DM DOKURO releases Universal Collapse for republishing with credit. I and the developers of Fennec, EDF Remastered, and other affiliated mods do not claim ownership over either of these pieces of music.

Jukefox includes assets inspired by and referenced from [Create - The Factory Must Grow](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tfmg) and the textures of [Malcolm Riley](https://github.com/malcolmriley/unused-textures). TFMG is licensed MIT, and Malcolm Riley's textures are licensed Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International. All reference and use of these resources is in-line with their respective license terms. If you are a copyright holder over one of the above works, and have a dispute with how Jukefox has used your work, please make an issue on this mod's Source page with [LEGAL] in the title.
